subcodes.first_line: O true heir of that sagacious man! Your missive indicating [your] safe arrival hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الوریث الحقیقی لذلک الرجل الرشید قد وصلت نمیقتکم الداله علی الوصول محفوظا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @race unity; racial issues, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
